glossary_terms.definition_or_usage: Chinese dissident artist invoked as a witness whose time in Germany supposedly reversed his free-speech expectations.
Used for externally managed protest destabilization scripts.
Named as a Chinese religious movement that Jiang describes as CIA-adjacent after its founder built a media empire in New York.
Host phrase for rule-following learned in advance so authorities do not need to state the rule directly.
Exclusive Disney park club invoked as part of a quasi-sovereign or elite-gated institutional ecosystem.
Used for Disney/EPCOT-style managed urban design as a prototype of tightly administered everyday life.
Disney prototype city cited as an early version of the controlled urban future.
